hallucinations.description: The paper cites multiple nonexistent or fabricated academic references, including 'Dayan et al. (2026)' and the arXiv entry 'abs/2602.01083, 2026'. These do not correspond to any real publications and appear to be AI-generated hallucinations.
hallucinations.evidence: REFERENCES section: 'A. Dayan, Yam Eitan, and Haggai Maron. On the expressive power of permutation-equivariant weight-space networks. ArXiv, abs/2602.01083, 2026.' and multiple in-text citations to 'Dayan et al. (2026)' throughout the paper.

overall_assessment: The paper contains hallucinations in the form of nonexistent citations. Experimental numbers and methodology roughly align with the provided code/results, but the fabricated references are a clear violation.
